Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block

Class MutableBlockChunkImpl

java.lang.Object
net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.MutableBlockChunkImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BlockChunk, MutableBlockChunk
@NullMarked public class MutableBlockChunkImpl extends BlockChunkImpl implements MutableBlockChunk
MutableBlockChunkImpl provides a mutable implementation of BlockChunk, allowing for dynamic modification of block data within a chunk. Extends BlockChunkImpl and implements MutableBlockChunk. Supports block placement, removal, and chunk mutation operations.

  • Constructor Details

    • MutableBlockChunkImpl

      public MutableBlockChunkImpl(net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder, double scaler, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position actualPos, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position chunkPos, @Nullable @Nullable BlockChunk prev)
      Constructs a mutable block chunk with a previous chunk reference.
      Parameters:
      axisOrder - The axis order for block arrangement.
      scaler - The scaling factor for chunk size.
      actualPos - The actual position of the chunk.
      chunkPos - The logical position of the chunk.
      prev - The previous block chunk.

    • MutableBlockChunkImpl

      public MutableBlockChunkImpl(net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder, double scaler, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position actualPos, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position chunkPos)

      Parameters:

      scaler - The scaling factor for chunk size.
      actualPos - The actual position of the chunk.
      chunkPos - The logical position of the chunk.
